§ 01Program Complete

Dear {{sellerName}},

Today marks the conclusion of the Forhemit COOP stewardship program for {{companyName}}. Over the past {{stewardshipDuration}}, we have worked together to ensure a successful transition to employee ownership.

Complete
Stewardship Successfully Completed
{{stewardshipStartDate}}
{{stewardshipEndDate}}
{{stewardshipDuration}}

§ 02What We Accomplished Together

Here is a summary of what was achieved during the stewardship period:

T1People. {{track1Accomplishment}}
T2Systems. {{track2Accomplishment}}
T3Financial. {{track3Accomplishment}}
T4Governance. {{track4Accomplishment}}
§ 03Where You Stand Now

At the conclusion of the stewardship program, {{companyName}} is in a strong position:

Fully operational, annual administration in place
Board and ESOP committee functioning independently
Debt service current, repurchase obligation funded
Key-person dependencies reduced, SOPs documented
§ 04What Happens Next

With the stewardship program complete, the following items require your ongoing attention:

A.Annual ESOP administration. Your ESOP administrator will handle annual valuations, participant statements, and 5500 filings. Forhemit recommends {{recommendedAdministrator}}.
B.Annual audit. Continue the annual financial audit as required by the ESOP plan document and DOL regulations.
C.Board meetings. Maintain quarterly board meetings with ESOP committee oversight. The governance structures built during stewardship should continue.
D.Repurchase obligation. Continue funding the repurchase obligation per the plan document. Your actuary will provide annual estimates.
E.Refinance window. The SBA 7(a) loan has a refinancing window around Month 14–18. Forhemit or your lender will contact you when this approaches.
Ongoing support: While the formal stewardship program is complete, Forhemit remains available for ad-hoc questions, referrals, and support. You can reach us at deals@forhemit.com at any time.
§ 05A Personal Note

When we began this journey — from the first deal screener call through the 120-day transaction and into the stewardship period — the goal was always the same: to put {{companyName}} in the hands of the people who built it.

That goal has been achieved. The company is employee-owned, the governance structures are in place, and the operational foundation is solid. What happens next is up to you and your team.

It has been a privilege to work with you. On behalf of the entire Forhemit team, thank you for trusting us with this transition.

§ 06Contact

For any future questions or referrals, please contact:

deals@forhemit.com
